name: Tickarr
description: Dynamic text overlays for IPTV channels — Satellite Radio Now Playing, Sports Ticker, Custom Text, EAS Weather Alerts
author: jstevenscl

actions.label: Enable Now Playing
actions.description: Registers targeted channels for the Satellite Radio Now Playing overlay. In On-Demand mode, the overlay activates when a viewer tunes in and restores to passthrough when the channel goes idle (requires one restart per connect). In Always On mode, the overlay profile is assigned permanently at enable time — no restart ever happens on connect, at the cost of a heavier encode for any connection (viewer or otherwise) once the channel is watched.

confirm.message: This will register the selected channels for Now Playing. Channels already enabled will be skipped. Continue?

actions.label: Disable Now Playing
actions.description: Removes the Now Playing overlay from all targeted channels and restores their original stream profiles.

confirm.message: This will restore the original stream profile and remove ticker data for the selected Now Playing channel(s). Continue?

actions.label: Fill EPG — Full Satellite Radio Guide
actions.description: Downloads Tickarr's satellite radio EPG and assigns it to the selected channels — sets tvg-id, channel name, and full guide data. Run this first if your satellite radio channels have no EPG.

confirm.message: Downloads Tickarr's satellite radio EPG and assigns it to the selected channels. Continue?

actions.label: Fill EPG — TVG ID Only
actions.description: Sets the tvg-id only on selected channels so they match an EPG source you already have loaded. Use this instead of Full EPG if you have an existing EPG source.

confirm.message: Sets the TVG ID on selected channels so they can match an EPG source you already have loaded. Does not download any guide data. Continue?

actions.label: Sort Channels
actions.description: Renumbers selected channels by satellite radio lineup order, starting from the Sort Start Number in Settings (auto-detected if blank).

confirm.message: Renumbers selected channels by satellite radio lineup order, starting from Sort Start Number (or auto-detected if blank). Continue?

actions.label: Assign Logos
actions.description: Sets channel logos from Tickarr's built-in satellite radio logo library. Channels with no match are skipped.

confirm.message: Sets logos on selected channels using Tickarr's built-in satellite radio logo library. Channels with no match are skipped. Continue?

actions.label: Fill EPG + Sort
actions.description: Runs Full Satellite Radio EPG fill and Sort Channels together on the selected channels. Use this when you want EPG data assigned and channels renumbered in one step.

confirm.message: Runs Full Satellite Radio EPG fill and Sort Channels together on the selected channels. Continue?

actions.label: Fill EPG + Sort + Logos
actions.description: Runs Full EPG fill, Sort Channels, and Assign Logos together. Recommended for a complete first-time satellite radio setup.

confirm.message: Runs Full Satellite Radio EPG fill, Sort Channels, and Assign Logos together on the selected channels. Continue?

actions.label: NWS Zone Lookup — Find USA Zone Codes
actions.description: Enter a 2-letter US state code in the Zone Lookup field in Settings, then click this button to get a list of all NWS public zone codes and names for that state. Find your zone and paste it into NWS Alert Zones above.

actions.label: Enable EAS — JAS Weather Alerts
actions.description: Arms selected channels for EAS monitoring. No profile is cloned until a real NWS alert fires for your configured zones — channels stream normally until then. Can be enabled alongside any existing ticker type.

confirm.message: Arms the selected channels for EAS. No profile is cloned yet — the overlay only activates when a real NWS alert fires for your configured zones. Continue?

actions.label: Test EAS Alert
actions.description: Fires a fake EAS alert on the enabled channels for the configured Test Alert Duration, then auto-restores. Use this to verify your overlay style, severity label, and attention tone without waiting for a real alert.

confirm.message: Fires a fake EAS alert overlay on the selected EAS-enabled channel(s) for the configured duration, then auto-restores. Continue?

actions.label: Disable EAS Ticker
actions.description: Disarms all EAS-enabled channels and restores their original stream profiles. If an alert is currently active, the overlay is also removed.

confirm.message: This will restore the original stream profile and remove the EAS overlay for the selected channel(s). Continue?

actions.label: Migrate EAS to Dynamic Mode
actions.description: One-time migration for installs upgrading from an older Tickarr version that used always-on EAS profiles. Restores all EAS channels to passthrough and re-arms them in dynamic mode.

confirm.message: This restores all EAS channels to their original passthrough profiles and removes the old always-on re-encode profiles. Channels will automatically switch to EAS overlay only when a real NWS alert fires. Continue?

actions.label: Weather Canada City Lookup — Find City Codes
actions.description: Enter a city name (e.g. Toronto) or 2-letter province code (e.g. ON, QC, BC) in the City Lookup field in Settings, then click this button to get a list of matching city IDs. Paste the code you want into Weather Canada City IDs above.

actions.label: Enable Weather Canada Alerts
actions.description: Arms selected channels for Environment Canada alert monitoring. No profile is cloned until an active alert fires for your configured city IDs — channels stream normally until then. Can be enabled alongside NWS EAS or any existing ticker type.

confirm.message: Arms the selected channels for Weather Canada alerts. No profile is cloned yet — the overlay only activates when an active EC alert fires for your configured city IDs. Continue?

actions.label: Test Weather Canada Alert
actions.description: Fires a fake Weather Canada alert on the enabled channels for the configured Test Alert Duration, then auto-restores. Use this to verify the overlay and NAAD attention tone without waiting for a real alert.

confirm.message: Fires a fake Weather Canada alert overlay on the selected channels for the configured duration, then auto-restores. Continue?

actions.label: Disable Weather Canada Alerts
actions.description: Disarms all Weather Canada-enabled channels and restores their original stream profiles. If an alert is currently active, the overlay is also removed.

confirm.message: This will restore the original stream profile and remove the Weather Canada alert overlay for the selected channel(s). Continue?

actions.label: Enable Custom Text
actions.description: Registers channels for the Custom Text overlay. In On-Demand mode, no profile is cloned until text is set via Update Custom Text. In Always On mode, profiles are cloned and the overlay starts immediately.

confirm.message: This will register the selected channels for the Custom Text overlay. Channels that already have any ticker type enabled will be skipped. Continue?

actions.label: Update Custom Text
actions.description: Sets or changes the displayed message on active Custom Text channels without interrupting the stream. In On-Demand mode, activates the overlay when text is provided or restores passthrough when text is cleared.

actions.label: Disable Custom Ticker
actions.description: Removes the Custom Text overlay from all targeted channels and restores their original stream profiles.

confirm.message: This will restore the original stream profile and remove ticker data for the selected Custom Text channel(s). Continue?

actions.label: Enable Sports Ticker
actions.description: Registers channels for the Sports Ticker. In Always On mode, profiles are cloned immediately. In smart trigger modes, the overlay activates when a qualifying live game is detected and restores to passthrough when all games end.

confirm.message: This will register the selected channels for the Sports Ticker. Channels that already have any ticker type enabled will be skipped. Continue?

actions.label: Update Sports Ticker
actions.description: Updates the league selection, trigger mode, or display settings on already-enabled Sports Ticker channels without restarting the stream. Changes take effect within ~30 seconds.

actions.label: Test Sports Ticker
actions.description: Fires fake score data on the selected channel for the configured Test Ticker Duration, then auto-restores. Use this to verify position, font size, color mode, and ticker style without waiting for a live game.

confirm.message: Fires a fake sports ticker overlay on the selected channel for the configured duration, then auto-restores. Tune to the channel after running to see your settings in action. Continue?

actions.label: Disable Sports Ticker
actions.description: Removes the Sports Ticker overlay from all targeted channels and restores their original stream profiles.

confirm.message: This will restore the original stream profile and remove ticker data for the selected Sports Ticker channel(s). Continue?

actions.label: View Active Tickers
actions.description: Lists all channels with an active Tickarr overlay, grouped by type. Shows which channels are actively transcoding vs. on passthrough.

actions.label: Refresh Channel Data
actions.description: Reloads the channel and group list from Dispatcharr. Run this if a channel or group is missing from a dropdown in Settings.

actions.label: Disable All Tickers
actions.description: Removes every active Tickarr overlay across all channels and restores all original stream profiles.

confirm.message: This will restore original stream profiles and remove ticker data for ALL enabled channels. Continue?

actions.label: Clean Orphaned Profiles
actions.description: Removes Tickarr-cloned stream profiles left behind when channels were deleted while a ticker was active.

confirm.message: This will delete all Tickarr-cloned stream profiles that have no active channel mapping. Continue?

actions.label: Redis Diagnostics
actions.description: Reports whether Redis is reachable and how many channels have active viewers detected. Use this to diagnose on-demand mode not triggering.

actions.label: Reload Poller
actions.description: Restarts the background polling threads without restarting Dispatcharr. Use if overlays stop updating but streams are still live.

confirm.message: This will restart the background polling thread. Active ticker data will resume within 15 seconds. Continue?

actions.label: Restart Dispatcharr
actions.description: Restarts the Dispatcharr container. Required after every install or update. The page will go offline for about 15 seconds — refresh after it comes back.

confirm.message: This will send a graceful restart signal to Dispatcharr. The page will go offline briefly — refresh in about 15 seconds. Continue?
